results.reason: Validated via real flow-editor UI: after adding a Webhook Trigger node, the node inspector showed an auto-generated webhook URL containing a non-empty hook ID (`hook_vh4k5un4`), demonstrating onNodeCreate hook mutation at node creation.
evidence: Inspector field value read from UI textbox: http://127.0.0.1:8000/webhooks/hook_vh4k5un4

commands.observation: Agents page loaded and New Agent flow was available.

commands.command: agent-browser --session utv_pluginapi_g5 create agent named utv_pluginapi_g5-nodecreate-rerun2
commands.observation: Agent was created and editor opened at /agents/edit with id=27e75495-42aa-4cd5-a1af-ae7066f40487.

commands.command: agent-browser --session utv_pluginapi_g5 open Add Node menu, search 'webhook', select 'Trigger Webhook Trigger'
commands.observation: Webhook Trigger node was added to the canvas (node id webhook-trigger-1772527141595-vqv25).

commands.command: agent-browser --session utv_pluginapi_g5 double-click webhook-trigger node to open inspector
commands.observation: Node inspector opened with webhook configuration controls and route field.

commands.command: agent-browser --session utv_pluginapi_g5 get value from inspector route textbox
commands.observation: Textbox value was http://127.0.0.1:8000/webhooks/hook_vh4k5un4 (auto-populated hook id present).
Screenshot captured of inspector showing populated webhook URL/hook id.

commands.command: agent-browser --session utv_pluginapi_g5 console && agent-browser --session utv_pluginapi_g5 errors
commands.observation: Console had no blocking failures for this assertion path; page errors included unrelated 400 resource logs but did not prevent node-create hook verification.

interactiveChecks.action: Create namespaced agent workspace and enter flow editor
interactiveChecks.observed: Flow editor opened successfully for utv_pluginapi_g5-nodecreate-rerun2.

interactiveChecks.action: Create a Webhook Trigger node through Add Node UI
interactiveChecks.observed: Webhook Trigger node rendered on canvas immediately after selection.

interactiveChecks.action: Inspect newly-created Webhook Trigger node values
interactiveChecks.observed: Inspector displayed webhook URL with generated hook id (hook_vh4k5un4) without manual entry.

frictions: agent-browser wait returned transient 'Resource temporarily unavailable (os error 35)' once while waiting for dialog text; retried with snapshot/eval flow and continued.
